zh.lifeSummary: 當Isilia Bourges於大約1072年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Hervey De Bourges28歲，母親Judith Malet17歲。她於大約1089年與William Pecche在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1121年之後在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Bourges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Jacques, Lucien, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Germaine, Laurent, Ludger, Marcel, Marcell.
French: topographic name, a diminutive of   Bourg  , or a habitational name from (Le) Bourget, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Altered form of French Bourgeais, a variant of Bourgeois .

variants.name: Bourg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Antoine, Cecile, Emile, Alcide, Anatole, Clovis, Ferrel, Leonce, Onile.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in a town as opposed to one who lived in a village, from Middle French bourg (Old French burc) ‘fortified town’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bourg, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Bourke , Bourque , Burk , and Burke .

History: Antoine Bourg/Bourque from Martaizé in Vienne, France, married Antoinette Landry in Acadia c. 1642. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Bourke, Bourque, and Burk(e).

en.lifeSummary: When Isilia Bourges was born about 1072, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hervey De Bourges, was 28 and her mother, Judith Malet, was 17. She married William Pecche about 1089, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1121, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isilia Bourges est née environ 1072, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey De Bourges, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Judith Malet, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Pecche environ 1089, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1121, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isilia Bourgesが約1072年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Hervey De Bourgesは28歳，母Judith Maletは17歳であった。約1089年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでWilliam Peccheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1121年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isilia Bourges(이)가 대략 1072년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hervey De Bourges(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith Malet(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 William Pecche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1121년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isilia Bourges родилась около 1072 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hervey De Bourges было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Malet, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pecche около 1089 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1121 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
